item.title: Restoring a Worn Farm Gearbox
item.description: A worn gearbox is disassembled and restored, showing inspection, repair steps, and mechanical rebuilding to bring equipment back to working condition.

media:content.media:title: Restoring a Worn Farm Gearbox
media:content.media:description: A worn gearbox is disassembled and restored, showing inspection, repair steps, and mechanical rebuilding to bring equipment back to working condition.

item.title: Servicing a 16 Row Planter
item.description: A 16-row John Deere planter is serviced, showing maintenance steps, inspections, and adjustments to keep planting equipment running efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Servicing a 16 Row Planter
media:content.media:description: A 16-row John Deere planter is serviced, showing maintenance steps, inspections, and adjustments to keep planting equipment running efficiently.

item.title: What in the World Moment on the Farm
item.description: A surprising farm moment unfolds, capturing unexpected issues, reactions, and real-life challenges during daily agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: What in the World Moment on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A surprising farm moment unfolds, capturing unexpected issues, reactions, and real-life challenges during daily agricultural work.

item.title: Abandoned Dozer in a Barn
item.description: Laura takes a look at an abandoned dozer stored in a barn and checks whether it will start.

media:content.media:title: Abandoned Dozer in a Barn
media:content.media:description: Laura takes a look at an abandoned dozer stored in a barn and checks whether it will start.

item.title: Dirt Moving Jobs
item.description: Laura shares a look at dirt moving jobs in action.

media:content.media:title: Dirt Moving Jobs
media:content.media:description: Laura shares a look at dirt moving jobs in action.

item.title: Farm Tire Gets Stuck in the Field
item.description: A heavy farm tire becomes stuck in muddy ground, showing real farm challenges, recovery effort, and off-road vehicle conditions in action.

media:content.media:title: Farm Tire Gets Stuck in the Field
media:content.media:description: A heavy farm tire becomes stuck in muddy ground, showing real farm challenges, recovery effort, and off-road vehicle conditions in action.

item.title: Camping Inside a Tractor on the Farm
item.description: A unique farm camping setup inside a tractor, showing practical outdoor living, rural scenery, and creative ways to rest on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Camping Inside a Tractor on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A unique farm camping setup inside a tractor, showing practical outdoor living, rural scenery, and creative ways to rest on the farm.

item.title: Muddy Day Work on the Farm
item.description: A challenging day on the farm with deep mud conditions, showing tractors at work, tough terrain, and real agricultural daily operations.

media:content.media:title: Muddy Day Work on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A challenging day on the farm with deep mud conditions, showing tractors at work, tough terrain, and real agricultural daily operations.

item.title: Six Years of Farm Life Mornings
item.description: A reflection on six years of early mornings on the farm, capturing daily routines, dedication, and life in agriculture over time.

media:content.media:title: Six Years of Farm Life Mornings
media:content.media:description: A reflection on six years of early mornings on the farm, capturing daily routines, dedication, and life in agriculture over time.

item.title: Moving Cattle with a Four-Wheeler
item.description: A four-wheeler is used to help guide and move cattle across the field, showing practical farm handling and livestock management in action.

media:content.media:title: Moving Cattle with a Four-Wheeler
media:content.media:description: A four-wheeler is used to help guide and move cattle across the field, showing practical farm handling and livestock management in action.

item.title: Mowing a Large Lawn with Three Tractors
item.description: Three tractors work together to mow a large lawn, showing coordinated farm equipment use, efficient field coverage, and large-scale land maintenance.

media:content.media:title: Mowing a Large Lawn with Three Tractors
media:content.media:description: Three tractors work together to mow a large lawn, showing coordinated farm equipment use, efficient field coverage, and large-scale land maintenance.

item.title: A Challenging Moment on the Farm
item.description: A farm task doesn’t go as expected, showing the challenges of equipment use, decision-making, and adapting to unexpected conditions in daily work.

media:content.media:title: A Challenging Moment on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A farm task doesn’t go as expected, showing the challenges of equipment use, decision-making, and adapting to unexpected conditions in daily work.

item.title: Combine Gets Stuck at a Bridge
item.description: A farm combine becomes stuck near a bridge, showing real equipment challenges, recovery efforts, and problem-solving in agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: Combine Gets Stuck at a Bridge
media:content.media:description: A farm combine becomes stuck near a bridge, showing real equipment challenges, recovery efforts, and problem-solving in agricultural work.
